description: Move browser coverage for patient product flows from the Next static app target to the Vite patient app target. Scope: update Playwright webServer/start commands, route mocks, static asset expectations, and smoke tests; preserve existing coverage for anonymous precheck, consent gates, MDI questionnaire flow, dashboard care workflows, billing timing, auth-protected pages, and public route behavior where applicable. Split marketing tests from patient-app tests if the deployment artifacts diverge. Acceptance criteria: E2E suite can run locally against Vite; CI artifacts still capture traces/screenshots on failure; tests verify representative deployed staging routes after the cutover.
title: Update Playwright E2E tests to run against Vite patient app
